# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind: Fresh DSA Practice with AI-Guided Play
- Summary: NewCodeGrind update: enhanced DSA practice with AI-assisted problem solving, refreshed UI flow, and updated problem filtering to boost learning momentum.
- Slug: codegrind-dsa-practice-refresh
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-dsa-practice-refresh
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-07-22-codegrind-dsa-practice-refresh.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind now emphasizes streamlined, AI-assisted DSA practice: faster problem discovery, real-time guidance from Azure OpenAI, and a clearer path from problem description to solution. The update keeps competition and progress tracking at the core, while improving authentication flow and user experience.
- CTA: Try the new AI-guided practice flow today and track your progress across the refreshed problem set.
- Visual brief: Static UI-focused image showing the CodeGrind problem editor with AI chat pane, a prominent DSA problem card, and a progress/profile panel. Cyberpunk-inspired but clean, emphasize problem-solving flow and real-time guidance.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
